text.title: Perplexity AI Research Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the question need live web data with citations?

conclusion.verdict: Use a direct fetch or upstream knowledge base.
Do not leak query intent via Perplexity; use internal channels.
Decompose into atomic sub-queries before any API call.
Single query but always with recency_filter='year' (or tighter).

example.trace: live_web_needed=true → compound_question=true → atomic decompose into 3 sub-queries with recency=year.
